creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #5)

> I'm working on an update to Rust 1.19.0. Once this is committed, could you please tell me if this > issue is still relevant?
No, now this issue is not relevant.
Rust was build without any errors.

# pkg version -v | grep rust
rust-1.19.0                        =   up-to-date with index

# uname -srm
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE amd64

PR can be closed.

P.S.
> Also, can you check if the build process ate all memory and swap and was killed?
No, build process not ate all memory and swap, but build time significantly increased :(
